title: 4. Performance Tracking: Token Usage & Latency Benchmarks

blocks.content: Optimizing agent loops for production requires tracing system latency bottlenecks and token metrics. The Performance dashboard aggregates data per run, showing costs and response times.
Open the 'Traces' view to evaluate trace timings:

items: Time-to-first-token latency: Measures model prompt response speed.
Tool execution latency: Isolates network delays or database query bottlenecks in your custom python/node scripts.
Total Turn execution time: Combines model planning loops and tool execution times.

blocks.content: Review token counters to track Gemini execution costs: input tokens, generated output tokens, cached tokens, and total token usage per prompt step.

blocks.code:
# Configure local logger to output verbose traces to standard out
adk run --verbose-perf-traces

blocks.content: Question 1: Which trace latency measurement isolates database queries or API execution bottlenecks from model inference delays?

- A) Time-to-first-token latency
- B) Tool execution latency
- C) Compiler compile time
Feedback: Option B is correct. Tool execution latency tracks the absolute runtime duration of your custom tools.
